supplier_type.description: Supplier type used for ApiConnector filter matching

is_call_source.description: True when this supplier delivers inbound calls rather than form leads

notify_email.description: Email address for supplier notifications. Nullable.

notify_whatsapp.description: WhatsApp number for supplier notifications. Nullable.

notify_slack_channel.description: Slack channel for supplier notifications. Nullable.

notify_on_state_change.description: When true, notify this supplier on state coverage changes

vertical.description: Optional vertical code this supplier is associated with

payout_value.description: Price for Flat CPL, or percentage for Revenue % / Profit %

portal_enabled.description: When true, this supplier source can log into the source portal to reconcile leads sent vs received

campaign_ids.description: JSON array of Campaign record ids assigned to this supplier
